center.name: Cobar
center.summary: Cobar是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Buff-rumped thornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Primarily distributed in eastern Australia, the buff-rumped thornbill's range spans from Chinchilla, Queensland, west to Cobar, New South Wales, across Victoria and southeastern South Australia. This is an area of approximately 2 000 000 km2. This adaptable species thrives in dry sclerophyll forests and open eucalypt woodlands that have an open or sparse understorey. [[File:Distribution of the Buff Rumped Thornbill in Australia.jpg|thumb|Distribution of Acanthiza reguloides within Australia
